parsed_output.justification: Justin, Mike, and Mitchell have consistent stories: Justin claims he was the Drunk, Mike claims he was the Robber who stole the Drunk card from Justin, and Mitchell claims he was the Troublemaker who swapped Mike and Julie. If these claims are true, Julie is the only remaining player. Julie's behavior—contradicting herself about waking up and explicitly asking to be killed—is characteristic of the Tanner role. If Julie is the Tanner and the other three are telling the truth about their roles, no Werewolf is present among the players.
